summary: Iteration 3 validated all NEW enhancements: (1) Backend /api/ideas returns 6 fresh non-repeating ideas with rich schema (angle/category/title/hook/reasoning/target_audience/tone/scores). (2) Frontend IdeaRadar now positioned ABOVE the InputForm and AUTO-LOADS on mount without user click. (3) Cards show angle label, category, Telugu title, English reasoning, three Score pills (Relevance/Local/Awareness), target audience, and 'Use this' button. (4) 'Use this' click prefills offer/category/tone/notes. (5) Refresh button refetches. (6) Poster: QR toggle (off/maps/whatsapp) works, PDF & PNG download buttons present, image crop sliders (zoom/offsetX/offsetY) render after image upload. Zero console errors. All 6 pytest backend tests pass in 48.85s.
passed: POST /api/ideas count=6 with recent_offers → 6 items, Telugu present, ≥2 distinct categories & tones (pytest)
POST /api/generate regression → 200 with all 9 Telugu keys (pytest)
Home page: IdeaRadar rendered ABOVE InputForm (radar y=381 < offer y=992)
IdeaRadar auto-loads on mount: 6 idea-cards rendered without any button click
All 6 cards have 6 UNIQUE angle labels (e.g. 'Monsoon Power Backup', 'Bonalu Home Upgrade', 'Student Back-to-School Tech', etc.)
Each card displays angle + category + Telugu title + reasoning + 3 ScorePills (RELEVANCE/LOCAL/AWARENESS) + target_audience + 'Use this' button
Clicking 'Use this' prefills offer-input with Telugu title (verified: 'వర్షాలు వచ్చాయి, కరెంటు పోకుండా...')
Generate flow end-to-end: form fill → ContentTabs render → tab-whatsapp/tab-social/tab-tagline/tab-poster all present
Poster tab: qr-toggle with qr-off/qr-maps/qr-whatsapp all present; qr-maps injects QR image, qr-off removes it
Poster tab: download-pdf-btn AND download-poster-btn both present
After product image upload: img-zoom, img-offset-x, img-offset-y sliders appear
Zero console errors across entire flow
critical_code_review_comments: IdeaRadar useEffect has empty dependency array [] but references hasLoaded/loading — React eslint would flag exhaustive-deps warning. Behavior is intentional (mount-only fire), consider adding // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps for clarity.

recentOffers is a new array reference on every Home render (history.slice(0,20).map(...)) — but since IdeaRadar autoLoad guards with hasLoaded, this doesn't cause re-fetch loops. Still, wrapping in useMemo in Home.jsx would be cleaner.

normalizeCategory() in IdeaRadar.jsx has an implicit fallback to 'Home Appliance' — if LLM returns an unknown category label, the select silently gets 'Home Appliance'. Consider logging a warning in dev to catch drift.

Backend /api/ideas response schema declares `scores: dict = {}` — no field-level validation. If LLM returns non-numeric score values, ScorePill silently coerces to 0 via `Number(value) || 0`. Fine, but could add explicit Pydantic model for scores.
server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] and os.environ['DB_NAME'] at module load without try/except — will crash on start if env missing (acceptable fail-fast, but no descriptive message).
seed_data_creation: None — history test creates and deletes its own TEST_ item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 (Jan 2026) re-validated the enhanced IdeaRadar (auto-load on mount, ABOVE form, rich cards with scores+reasoning+target) plus Poster QR toggle, PDF download, and image crop sliders. Backend endpoint /api/ideas takes ~10-15s; use 55-90s timeout. Range sliders (img-zoom, img-offset-x, img-offset-y) only appear AFTER a product image is uploaded via the file input. Score pills use uppercase labels RELEVANCE/LOCAL/AWARENESS. Home.jsx uses history.slice(0,20).map(h=>h.offer) as recentOffers input.
